# Influencer Insurance NZ
## https://influencerinsurance.co.nz

Influencer Insurance NZ is New Zealand's specialist insurance referral service for content creators, social media influencers, YouTubers, TikTokers, podcasters and digital entrepreneurs.

## What We Do
We connect NZ content creators with licensed insurance advisers and brokers who specialise in creator-economy cover. We are a referral service only — not an insurer or financial adviser.

## Core Coverage Types
- Public Liability Insurance — for events, activations, filming at third-party locations
- Equipment & Gear Insurance — for cameras, drones, laptops, audio and production gear
- Cyber & Privacy Insurance — for hacked accounts, data breaches, cyber extortion
- Professional Indemnity Insurance — for brand deal disputes, misleading content claims

## Creator Types Served
Instagram influencers, YouTube creators, TikTok creators, podcasters, travel influencers, fitness and wellness creators, gaming streamers, fashion and beauty creators.

## Key NZ Regulatory Context
- Fair Trading Act 1986: influencers must clearly disclose sponsored content; fines up to $200,000 per offence
- Privacy Act 2020: creators who collect subscriber or follower data have data protection obligations
- Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013: the advisers we refer you to are licensed FAPs under this Act

## Pricing (indicative)
Public liability: from $25/month | Equipment cover: from $25/month | Cyber insurance: from $30/month | Professional indemnity: from $43/month

## Contact
Website: https://influencerinsurance.co.nz
Email: hello@influencerinsurance.co.nz

## Disclaimer
This website provides general information only and does not constitute financial advice. All insurance advice is provided by independently licensed NZ Financial Advice Providers.
